entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A sequencing method that enables genomic selection approaches to improve crop traits

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: An approach used to improve yield, stress resistance, and nutritional value

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of a crop

entities.name: STRESS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand adverse environmental conditions

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL VALUE
entities.description: The quality and quantity of nutrients in a crop

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms used to cover intraspecific genetic variation

entities.name: INTRASPECIFIC GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: Genetic variation within a single species that explains a proportion of phenotypes

entities.name: PHENOTYPES
entities.description: The observable physical or biochemical characteristics of an organism

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC PLASTICITY
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to produce different phenotypes in response to different environments

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: External factors that drive transcriptional, post-transcriptional, translational, post-translational, epigenetic, and metabolic regulation

entities.name: METABOLOMICS PLATFORMS
entities.description: Analytical platforms used for the prediction of nutritional value or stress resistance

entities.name: NGS PLATFORMS
entities.description: Next-generation sequencing platforms used for genotyping

entities.name: GREEN SYSTEMS BIOLOGY
entities.description: A framework for future breeding strategies integrating multiple molecular levels

entities.name: PANOMICS ANALYSIS
entities.description: An integrated analysis of multiple omics levels combined with genome selection and deep learning

entities.name: DEEP LEARNING
entities.description: A computational method used to improve prediction accuracy for trait performance

entities.name: MARKER DEPENDENT TRAIT PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The performance of a specific trait based on associated genetic markers

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A tool used to accelerate and enhance functional validation of trait-specific breeding

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used to accelerate the breeding cycle and functional validation

entities.name: PRECISION BREEDING
entities.description: A targeted breeding approach for large-scale functional validation of traits
